FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Release
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Just a version bump for the official Steam Workshop release.

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Auto-opening Window Bugfix
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Fixes a bug where the 'stock animal' dialog would open as soon as a caravan with animals left the player colony.

patchNoteLines.li: Bugfix: 'stock animals' dialog would appear as soon as a player caravan with animals left their colony
